> ^ * W F 198(31), a r t t e 2 0 ^ , 2014 ^ * ^ ^ * ^ * 1 MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 8th September, 2016 G.S.R. 872(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 48 of the Coffee Act, 1942 (VII of 1942), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Coffee Board (Cadre and Recruitment) Rules, 2014, namely: - 1 (1) These rules may be called the Coffee Board (Cadre and Recruitment) Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Coffee Board (Cadre and Recruitment) Rules, 2014 (hereinafter referred to as the principal rules),- (1) in rule 2, in clause (b), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted; (2) in rule 5, - (a) in clause (b), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted; (b) the words “and other posts identified as key posts by the Government of India” shall be omitted; (c) in clause (c), for the words “Chairman subject to selection by Executive Committee”, the words “Secretary, subject to selection by Departmental Promotion Committee” shall be substituted; (d) in clause (d), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted; (e) in clause (e), the words “and with the approval of Chairman”, shall be omitted. (3) in rule 6, - (a) under the heading, ‘I. Direct Recruitment’, in clause (a), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted; (b) under the heading, ‘II. Promotion’, in clause (b), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. (4) In the principal rules, after rule 16, the following rule shall be inserted, namely: - “17. Disqualification.- No candidate, (a) who has entered into or contracted a marriage with a person having a spouse living; or (b) who, having a spouse living, has entered into or contracted a marriage with any person, shall be eligible for appointment to service; -- 8 of 13 -- [*(FT II— <aus 3(i)] TO TST Tftm : 3RH W 9 (5) Provided that the Board may if satisfied that, such a marriage is permissible under the personal law applicable to such a person and the other grounds for doing so, exempt any person from the operation of this rule”. In the principal rules, in the Schedule, under the heading ‘(i) “Non-Technical” Administrative or Ministerial Posts’- (i) serial number 1 and entries relating thereto shall be omitted; (ii) in serial number 2 - (a) in column (3), for the words “PB-3, Rs.15600-39100 plus GP Rs.7600”, the words “PB-4, Rs.37400-Rs.67000 with grade pay of Rs.10000” shall be substituted; (b) in column (9), for the words “Deputy Secretary”, the words “Joint Secretary” shall be substituted; (iii) in serial number 4 - (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (iv) in serial number 5 - (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (v) in serial number 6 - (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (vi) in serial number 7 - (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (vii) in serial number 8 - (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (viii) in serial number 9 - (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (ix) in serial number 10 - (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (x) in serial number 11 - (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xi) in serial number 12 - -- 9 of 13 -- 10 T H E G A Z E T T E O F I N D I A : E X T R A O R D I N A R Y [PART I I — S E C . 3(i)] (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xii) in serial number 13 - (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (6) In the principal rules, in the Schedule, under the heading ‘(ii) “Scientific” Posts’ - (i) in serial number 1,- (a) in column (11), for the word, “Chairman” occurring at both places, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (ii) in serial number 2,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (iii) in serial number 3, for the post of “Divisional Head - [1] Agronomy”,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (iv) in serial number 3, for the post of “Divisional Head - [2] Plant Breeding and Genetics”,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (v) in serial number 3, for the post of “Divisional Head - [3] Plant Tissue Culture and Biotechnology”,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (vi) in serial number 3, for the post of “Divisional Head - [4] Plant Physiology”,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (vii) in serial number 3, for the post of “Divisional Head - [5] Agricultural Chemistry”,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (viii) in serial number 3, for the post of “Divisional Head - [6] Plant Pathology”,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; -- 10 of 13 -- [*(FT II— <aus 3(i)] TO TST Tftm : 3RH W 11 (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (ix) in serial number 3, for the post of “Divisional Head - [7] Entomology”,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (x) in serial number 3, for the post of “Divisional Head - [8] Post Harvest Technology”,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xi) in serial number 3, for the post of “Divisional Head - [9] Coffee Quality”,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xii) in serial number 4,- (a) in column (11), for the words, “By the Executive Committee”, the words, “By the Departmental Promotion Committee”, shall be substituted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xiii) in serial number 5, for the post of “Subject Matter Specialist - [1] Agronomy”,- (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xiv) in serial number 5, for the post of “Subject Matter Specialist - [2] Plant Breeding and Genetics”,- (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xv) in serial number 5, for the post of “Subject Matter Specialist - [3] Plant Tissue Culture and Biotechnology”,- (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xvi) in serial number 5, for the post of “Subject Matter Specialist - [4] Plant Physiology”,- (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xvii) in serial number 5, for the post of “Subject Matter Specialist - [5] Agricultural Chemistry”,- (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xviii) in serial number 5, for the post of “Subject Matter Specialist - [6] Plant Pathology”,- -- 11 of 13 -- 12 T H E G A Z E T T E O F I N D I A : E X T R A O R D I N A R Y [PART I I — S E C . 3(i)] (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xix) in serial number 5, for the post of “Subject Matter Specialist - [7] Entomology”,- (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted; (b) in column (12), for the word, “Chairman”, the word, “Secretary”, shall be substituted; (xx) in serial number 5, for the post of “Subject Matter Specialist-[8] (a) Biochemistry [Post- Harvest Technology] and [8] (b) Agricultural Engineering [Post-Harvest Technology]”,- (a) in column (11), the word “Chairman” shall be omitted;
